nodes.label: Create compressor with fallback detector (no Magika required).

End-to-end regressions for the June 2026 security audit findings.
SEC-01: an enabled entropy pass must preserve high-entropy strings.          Wit
SEC-02: the truncation fallback must not emit control chars into JSON.
